holdings.infoBox: GWX is an equity ETF with a total of 2106 individual holdings. The top holdings are AIXTRON SE stock at 0.39%, AT & S Austria Technologie & Systemtechnik Aktiengesellschaft at 0.39%, DAEDUCK ELECTRONICS at 0.33%, Meiko Electronics at 0.32%, and JUSUNG ENGINEERING at 0.31%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P International Small Cap ETF (GWX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Developed x United States <2B index, a market-cap-weighted index of small-cap companies in developed countries outside the US. GWX was launched on Apr 20, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
